      obtain ⟨N2, z2, rfl⟩ := h2
      use N1 * N2, (N2 : ℤ) • z1 + (N1 : ℤ) • z2
      simp only [TensorProduct.tmul_add, ← TensorProduct.tmul_smul]
      congr 1
      · simp only [PNat.mul_coe, Nat.cast_mul, mul_inv, zsmul_eq_mul]
        rw [mul_comm (N1 : ℚ)⁻¹, mul_assoc, inv_mul_cancel (Nat.cast_ne_zero.2 N2.ne_zero), mul_one]
      · simp only [PNat.mul_coe, Nat.cast_mul, mul_inv, zsmul_eq_mul]
        rw [mul_assoc, inv_mul_cancel (Nat.cast_ne_zero.2 N1.ne_zero), mul_one]
  obtain ⟨N, z', hy⟩ := this
  use N, z'
  apply iso.injective
  simp only [map_mul, hy, j₁, j₂, AlgHom.coe_comp, AlgHom.coe_coe, Function.comp_apply,
    AlgEquiv.toAlgHom_eq_coe, AlgEquiv.apply_symm_apply, Algebra.TensorProduct.includeRight_apply,
    Algebra.TensorProduct.includeLeft_apply, Algebra.TensorProduct.assoc_tmul, Algebra.TensorProduct.tmul_mul_tmul,
    mul_one, one_mul]

let e : D^ ≃ₐ[ℤ] ℚ ⊗[ℤ] 𝓞^ := Algebra.TensorProduct.assoc ℤ ℤ ℚ 𝓞 ZHat
  have h_surj (x : ℚ ⊗[ℤ] 𝓞^) : ∃ (N : ℕ+) (y : 𝓞^), x = (N⁻¹ : ℚ) ⊗ₜ y := by
    induction x using TensorProduct.induction_on with
    | zero => use 1, 0; simp
    | tmul q y =>
      use ⟨q.den, q.den_pos⟩, q.num • y
      rw [TensorProduct.tmul_smul, ← TensorProduct.smul_tmul]
      congr
      rw [← Rat.num_div_den q, div_eq_mul_inv]
    | add x₁ x₂ h₁ h₂ =>
      obtain ⟨N₁, y₁, rfl⟩ := h₁
      obtain ⟨N₂, y₂, rfl⟩ := h₂
      use N₁ * N₂, (N₂ : ℤ) • y₁ + (N₁ : ℤ) • y₂
      simp only [TensorProduct.tmul_add, TensorProduct.tmul_smul]
      rw [← TensorProduct.smul_tmul, ← TensorProduct.smul_tmul]
      congr 1 <;> {
        push_cast
        rw [mul_inv, mul_comm (N₁ : ℚ)⁻¹, mul_assoc, inv_mul_cancel_right₀, inv_mul_cancel_left₀]
        all_goals exact Nat.cast_ne_zero.mpr (PNat.ne_zero _)
      }
  obtain ⟨N, z', hz'⟩ := h_surj (e z)
  use N, z'
  apply e.injective
  simp only [map_mul, hz']
  rw [show e (j₂ z') = 1 ⊗ₜ z' by
    dsimp [e, j₂]
    simp only [AlgEquiv.toAlgHom_eq_coe, AlgHom.coe_comp, AlgHom.coe_coe, Function.comp_apply,
      Algebra.TensorProduct.includeRight_apply]
    rw [AlgEquiv.apply_symm_apply]]
  rw [show e (j₁ ((N⁻¹ : ℚ) ⊗ₜ 1)) = (N⁻¹ : ℚ) ⊗ₜ (1 : 𝓞^) by
    dsimp [e, j₁, HurwitzHat]
    simp only [Algebra.TensorProduct.includeLeft_apply, Algebra.TensorProduct.assoc_tmul]
    rfl]
  simp only [Algebra.TensorProduct.tmul_mul_tmul, mul_one, one_mul]

let e : D^ ≃ₐ[ℤ] ℚ ⊗[ℤ] 𝓞^ := Algebra.TensorProduct.assoc ℤ ℤ ℚ 𝓞 ZHat
  let y := e z
  have : ∃ (N : ℕ+) (z' : 𝓞^), y = (N⁻¹ : ℚ) ⊗ₜ z' := by

  refine ⟨N, z', e.injective ?_⟩

  trans ((N⁻¹ : ℚ) ⊗ₜ (1 : 𝓞^)) * (1 ⊗ₜ z')
  · congr
    · simp [e, j₁, Algebra.TensorProduct.includeLeft_apply, Algebra.TensorProduct.assoc_tmul]
    · simp [j₂]
  · rw [Algebra.TensorProduct.tmul_mul_tmul, mul_one, one_mul]

let e : D^ ≃ₐ[ℤ] ℚ ⊗[ℤ] 𝓞^ := Algebra.TensorProduct.assoc ℤ ℤ ℚ 𝓞 ZHat

    · rw [Nat.cast_mul, mul_inv, mul_assoc, inv_mul_cancel_right₀]

    · rw [Nat.cast_mul, mul_inv, mul_comm (Nx:ℚ)⁻¹, mul_assoc, inv_mul_cancel_right₀]
      norm_cast; exact Nx.ne_zero

end HurwitzRatHat

let iso := Algebra.TensorProduct.assoc ℤ ℤ ℚ 𝓞 ZHat

let e : ℚ ⊗[ℤ] 𝓞^ ≃ₐ[ℤ] D^ := (Algebra.TensorProduct.assoc ℤ ℤ ℚ 𝓞 ZHat).symm

      refine ⟨n₁ * n₂, (n₂ : ℤ) • z₁ + (n₁ : ℤ) • z₂, ?_⟩

      · rw [← mul_smul, smul_eq_mul, mul_comm (n₁ : ℚ)⁻¹, mul_assoc, inv_mul_cancel_right₀]

        exact Nat.cast_ne_zero.mpr n₁.ne_zero
  obtain ⟨N, z', hy⟩ := h (e.symm z)

  rw [← hy, AlgEquiv.apply_symm_apply, map_mul]

end HurwitzRatHat

induction z using TensorProduct.induction_on with
  | zero => exact ⟨1, 0, by simp⟩
  | tmul x y =>
    obtain ⟨N, o, rfl⟩ : ∃ (N : ℕ+) (o : 𝓞), x = ((N : ℚ)⁻¹ ⊗ₜ[ℤ] o) := by
      induction x using TensorProduct.induction_on with
      | zero => exact ⟨1, 0, by simp⟩
      | tmul q o =>
        use ⟨q.den, q.den_pos⟩, q.num • o
        rw [show q = (q.num : ℤ) • (q.den : ℚ)⁻¹ by simp [div_eq_mul_inv, Rat.num_div_den]]
        rw [TensorProduct.smul_tmul, TensorProduct.tmul_smul]
      | add x1 x2 h1 h2 =>
        obtain ⟨N1, o1, rfl⟩ := h1; obtain ⟨N2, o2, rfl⟩ := h2
        use N1 * N2, (N2 : ℤ) • o1 + (N1 : ℤ) • o2
        simp only [TensorProduct.tmul_add, ← TensorProduct.smul_tmul, zsmul_eq_mul,
          PNat.mk_coe, PNat.mul_coe, Nat.cast_mul, mul_inv]
        congr 1 <;> rw [mul_assoc, mul_comm _ (N2 : ℚ)⁻¹, mul_assoc]
        · rw [inv_mul_cancel_right₀ (Nat.cast_ne_zero.mpr N2.ne_zero)]
        · rw [mul_comm, inv_mul_cancel_right₀ (Nat.cast_ne_zero.mpr N1.ne_zero), mul_comm]
    use N, o ⊗ₜ[ℤ] y
    simp [j₁, j₂, Algebra.TensorProduct.includeLeft_apply, Algebra.TensorProduct.includeRight_apply,
      Algebra.TensorProduct.assoc_symm_tmul, Algebra.TensorProduct.tmul_mul_tmul]
  | add z1 z2 h1 h2 =>
    obtain ⟨N1, z1', rfl⟩ := h1; obtain ⟨N2, z2', rfl⟩ := h2
    use N1 * N2, (N2 : ℤ) • z1' + (N1 : ℤ) • z2'
    simp only [map_add, map_zsmul, mul_add, ← mul_assoc]
    congr 1 <;>
    { simp only [j₁, Algebra.TensorProduct.includeLeft_apply, map_zsmul,
        Algebra.TensorProduct.tmul_mul_tmul, mul_one, one_mul]
      rw [← TensorProduct.tmul_mul_tmul, mul_one]
      congr 1
      simp only [PNat.mk_coe, PNat.mul_coe, Nat.cast_mul, mul_inv]
      try rw [mul_assoc, inv_mul_cancel_right₀ (Nat.cast_ne_zero.mpr N2.ne_zero)]
      try rw [mul_comm (N1 : ℚ)⁻¹, mul_assoc, inv_mul_cancel_right₀ (Nat.cast_ne_zero.mpr N1.ne_zero)]
      try rw [mul_comm] }

have aux (d : D) : ∃ (N : ℕ+) (o : 𝓞), d = Algebra.TensorProduct.includeLeft (N : ℚ)⁻¹ * Algebra.TensorProduct.includeRight o := by
    induction d using TensorProduct.induction_on with
    | zero => use 1, 0; simp
    | tmul q o =>
      use ⟨q.den, q.den_pos⟩, q.num • o
      rw [map_zsmul, Algebra.TensorProduct.includeLeft_apply, Algebra.TensorProduct.includeRight_apply,
          Algebra.TensorProduct.tmul_mul_tmul, mul_one, one_mul]
      rw [← TensorProduct.smul_tmul', ← TensorProduct.tmul_smul, ← Int.cast_smul_eq_zsmul ℚ]
      congr
      rw [← Rat.num_div_den q, div_eq_mul_inv, mul_comm]
    | add x y hx hy =>
      rcases hx with ⟨Nx, ox, rfl⟩
      rcases hy with ⟨Ny, oy, rfl⟩
      use Nx * Ny, (Ny : ℤ) • ox + (Nx : ℤ) • oy
      simp only [Nat.cast_mul, mul_inv, map_add, map_zsmul]
      rw [mul_add]
      congr 1
      · rw [zsmul_mul_assoc, ← mul_zsmul, mul_comm (Algebra.TensorProduct.includeLeft _), mul_zsmul, ← mul_assoc]
        congr; simp only [Algebra.TensorProduct.includeLeft_apply, TensorProduct.tmul_one_right]
        ext; simp; rw [mul_comm, mul_inv_cancel_right₀ (Nat.cast_ne_zero.2 Nx.ne_zero)]
      · rw [zsmul_mul_assoc, ← mul_zsmul, mul_comm (Algebra.TensorProduct.includeLeft _), mul_zsmul, ← mul_assoc]
        congr; simp only [Algebra.TensorProduct.includeLeft_apply, TensorProduct.tmul_one_right]
        ext; simp; rw [mul_comm, mul_inv_cancel_left₀ (Nat.cast_ne_zero.2 Ny.ne_zero)]

  induction z using TensorProduct.induction_on with
  | zero => use 1, 0; simp
  | tmul d h =>
    rcases aux d with ⟨N, o, rfl⟩
    use N, o ⊗ₜ h
    rw [j₂, Algebra.TensorProduct.includeLeft_apply, Algebra.TensorProduct.includeRight_apply] at *
    rw [Algebra.TensorProduct.tmul_mul_tmul, mul_one, one_mul]
    rfl
  | add z1 z2 h1 h2 =>
    rcases h1 with ⟨N1, z1', rfl⟩
    rcases h2 with ⟨N2, z2', rfl⟩
    use N1 * N2, (N2 : ℤ) • z1' + (N1 : ℤ) • z2'
    rw [map_add, mul_add]
    congr 1
    · rw [map_zsmul, zsmul_mul_assoc, ← mul_zsmul, mul_comm (j₁ _), mul_zsmul, ← mul_assoc]
      congr; simp only [Algebra.TensorProduct.includeLeft_apply, TensorProduct.tmul_one_right]
      ext; simp
      rw [Nat.cast_mul, mul_inv, ← mul_assoc, mul_comm (N2 : ℚ), inv_mul_cancel₀ (Nat.cast_ne_zero.2 N2.ne_zero), one_mul]
    · rw [map_zsmul, zsmul_mul_assoc, ← mul_zsmul, mul_comm (j₁ _), mul_zsmul, ← mul_assoc]
      congr; simp only [Algebra.TensorProduct.includeLeft_apply, TensorProduct.tmul_one_right]
      ext; simp
      rw [Nat.cast_mul, mul_inv, mul_comm (N1 : ℚ)⁻¹, ← mul_assoc, inv_mul_cancel₀ (Nat.cast_ne_zero.2 N1.ne_zero), one_mul]

let e := Algebra.TensorProduct.assoc ℤ ℤ ℚ 𝓞 ZHat

      obtain ⟨Nx, zx, rfl⟩ := hx
      obtain ⟨Ny, zy, rfl⟩ := hy
      use Nx * Ny, (Ny : ℤ) • zx + (Nx : ℤ) • zy
      simp only [TensorProduct.tmul_add, TensorProduct.tmul_smul_comm, TensorProduct.smul_tmul']
      rw [← add_mul, ← mul_smul, ← mul_smul, mul_comm (Ny : ℚ)⁻¹, mul_comm (Nx : ℚ)⁻¹]
      norm_cast
      rw [mul_inv_rev, inv_mul_cancel_right₀, inv_mul_cancel_right₀]
      all_goals { exact Nat.cast_ne_zero.mpr (PNat.ne_zero _) }
  obtain ⟨N, z', heq⟩ := h_surj (e z)
  use N, z'
  apply e.injective
  rw [heq, map_mul, j₂, AlgEquiv.toAlgHom_eq_coe, AlgEquiv.apply_symm_apply]
  have : e (j₁ ((N⁻¹ : ℚ) ⊗ₜ 1 : D)) = (N⁻¹ : ℚ) ⊗ₜ[ℤ] (1 : 𝓞^) := rfl
  rw [this, Algebra.TensorProduct.tmul_mul_tmul, mul_one, one_mul]

end HurwitzRatHat

let e : D^ ≃ₐ[ℤ] ℚ ⊗[ℤ] 𝓞^ := Algebra.TensorProduct.assoc ℤ ℤ ℚ 𝓞 ZHat
  suffices ∃ (N : ℕ+) (z' : 𝓞^), e z = (N : ℚ)⁻¹ ⊗ₜ z' by
    obtain ⟨N, z', h⟩ := this
    use N, z'
    apply e.injective
    simp only [map_mul, h]
    have h1 : e (j₁ ((N⁻¹ : ℚ) ⊗ₜ 1)) = (N⁻¹ : ℚ) ⊗ₜ 1 := rfl
    have h2 : e (j₂ z') = 1 ⊗ₜ z' := by
      simp only [j₂, AlgEquiv.toAlgHom_eq_coe, AlgEquiv.coe_algHom, AlgEquiv.coe_trans,
        Function.comp_apply, AlgEquiv.apply_symm_apply, Algebra.TensorProduct.includeRight_apply]
    rw [h1, h2, Algebra.TensorProduct.tmul_mul_tmul, mul_one, one_mul]
  induction e z using TensorProduct.induction_on with
  | zero => use 1, 0; simp
  | tmul q x =>
    use ⟨q.den, Nat.pos_of_ne_zero q.den_nz⟩, q.num • x
    simp only [PNat.mk_coe, TensorProduct.tmul_smul, ← TensorProduct.smul_tmul]
    congr 1
    rw [← Rat.num_div_den q, div_eq_inv_mul]
    rfl
  | add x y hx hy =>
    obtain ⟨Nx, x', rfl⟩ := hx
    obtain ⟨Ny, y', rfl⟩ := hy
    use Nx * Ny, (Ny : ℤ) • x' + (Nx : ℤ) • y'
    simp only [PNat.mul_coe, Nat.cast_mul, TensorProduct.tmul_add, TensorProduct.tmul_smul]
    congr 1
    · rw [mul_inv, mul_comm, ← mul_assoc, inv_mul_cancel_right₀]
      exact Nat.cast_ne_zero.2 (PNat.ne_zero Ny)
    · rw [mul_inv, ← mul_assoc, inv_mul_cancel_right₀]
      exact Nat.cast_ne_zero.2 (PNat.ne_zero Nx)

let e : D^ ≃ₐ[ℤ] ℚ ⊗[ℤ] 𝓞^ := Algebra.TensorProduct.assoc ℤ ℚ 𝓞 ZHat
  obtain ⟨N, z', h⟩ : ∃ N z', e z = (N : ℚ)⁻¹ ⊗ₜ z' := by
    induction e z using TensorProduct.induction_on with
    | zero => use 1, 0; simp
    | tmul q o =>
      use ⟨q.den, q.den_pos⟩, q.num • o
      simp only [TensorProduct.tmul_smul, TensorProduct.smul_tmul, ← Rat.num_div_den q,
        div_eq_mul_inv, mul_comm]
    | add x y hx hy =>
      obtain ⟨Nx, x', rfl⟩ := hx
      obtain ⟨Ny, y', rfl⟩ := hy
      use Nx * Ny, (Ny : ℤ) • x' + (Nx : ℤ) • y'
      simp only [TensorProduct.tmul_add, TensorProduct.tmul_smul, ← TensorProduct.smul_tmul]
      congr 1 <;> simp only [PNat.mul_coe, Nat.cast_mul] <;> field_simp
  refine ⟨N, z', e.injective ?_⟩
  simp only [map_mul, h]
  rw [show e (j₂ z') = 1 ⊗ₜ z' from e.apply_symm_apply _]
  rw [show e (j₁ ((N⁻¹ : ℚ) ⊗ₜ 1)) = (N⁻¹ : ℚ) ⊗ₜ 1 by
    rw [Algebra.TensorProduct.includeLeft_apply, Algebra.TensorProduct.assoc_tmul]
    simp]
  simp only [TensorProduct.tmul_mul_tmul, mul_one, one_mul]

let e : ℚ ⊗[ℤ] 𝓞^ ≃ₐ[ℤ] D^ := (Algebra.TensorProduct.assoc ℤ ℤ ℚ 𝓞 ZHat).symm
  let w := e.symm z
  suffices ∃ (N : ℕ+) (z' : 𝓞^), w = (N⁻¹ : ℚ) ⊗ₜ z' by
    obtain ⟨N, z', rfl⟩ := this
    use N, z'
    apply e.symm.injective
    simp only [map_mul, AlgEquiv.symm_apply_apply]
    have h1 : e.symm (j₁ ((N⁻¹ : ℚ) ⊗ₜ 1)) = (N⁻¹ : ℚ) ⊗ₜ 1 := rfl
    have h2 : e.symm (j₂ z') = 1 ⊗ₜ z' := rfl
    rw [h1, h2, TensorProduct.tmul_mul_tmul, mul_one, one_mul]
  induction w using TensorProduct.induction_on with
  | zero => use 1, 0; simp
  | tmul q o =>
    use ⟨q.den, q.den_pos⟩, q.num • o
    rw [Rat.num_div_den q, mul_comm, ← zsmul_eq_mul, TensorProduct.smul_tmul, TensorProduct.tmul_smul]
  | add x y hx hy =>
    obtain ⟨N1, z1, rfl⟩ := hx
    obtain ⟨N2, z2, rfl⟩ := hy
    use N1 * N2, N2 • z1 + N1 • z2
    rw [TensorProduct.tmul_add, ← TensorProduct.smul_tmul, ← TensorProduct.smul_tmul]
    simp only [zsmul_eq_mul, PNat.mul_coe, Nat.cast_mul, mul_inv_rev]
    congr 1 <;> field_simp

end HurwitzRatHat

let iso : D^ ≃ₐ[ℤ] ℚ ⊗[ℤ] 𝓞^ := Algebra.TensorProduct.assoc ℤ ℤ ℚ 𝓞 ZHat
  let y := iso z
  have : ∃ (N : ℕ+) (z' : 𝓞^), y = (N : ℚ)⁻¹ ⊗ₜ z' := by
    induction y using TensorProduct.induction_on with
    | zero => use 1, 0; simp
    | tmul q z' =>
      use ⟨q.den, q.den_pos⟩, q.num • z'
      simp only [TensorProduct.tmul_smul]
      nth_rw 1 [← Rat.num_div_den q]
      rw [div_eq_mul_inv, TensorProduct.tmul_smul]
    | add y1 y2 h1 h2 =>
      obtain ⟨N1, z1, rfl⟩ := h1
      obtain ⟨N2, z2, rfl⟩ := h2
      use N1 * N2, (N2 : ℤ) • z1 + (N1 : ℤ) • z2
      simp only [TensorProduct.tmul_add, TensorProduct.tmul_smul]
      congr 1
      · rw [← mul_inv_cancel_right₀ (α := ℚ) (Nat.cast_ne_zero.2 N2.ne_zero) (N1 : ℚ)⁻¹]
        push_cast; ring
      · rw [← mul_inv_cancel_right₀ (α := ℚ) (Nat.cast_ne_zero.2 N1.ne_zero) (N2 : ℚ)⁻¹]
        push_cast; ring
  obtain ⟨N, z', rfl⟩ := this
  use N, z'
  apply iso.injective
  simp only [AlgEquiv.map_mul, AlgEquiv.apply_symm_apply]
  trans ((N : ℚ)⁻¹ ⊗ₜ (1 : 𝓞^)) * (1 ⊗ₜ z')
  · congr
    · simp only [j₁, AlgEquiv.toAlgHom_eq_coe, AlgHom.coe_comp, AlgHom.coe_coe, Function.comp_apply,
        AlgEquiv.coe_algHom, Algebra.TensorProduct.includeLeft_apply]
      erw [Algebra.TensorProduct.assoc_tmul]
      rfl
    · simp only [j₂, AlgEquiv.toAlgHom_eq_coe, AlgHom.coe_comp, AlgHom.coe_coe, Function.comp_apply,
        AlgEquiv.coe_algHom, AlgEquiv.apply_symm_apply]
      rfl
  · rw [Algebra.TensorProduct.tmul_mul_tmul, mul_one, one_mul]

let e : D^ ≃ₐ[ℤ] ℚ ⊗[ℤ] 𝓞^ := Algebra.TensorProduct.assoc ℤ ℤ ℚ 𝓞 ZHat
  suffices ∃ (N : ℕ+) (z' : 𝓞^), e z = (N : ℚ)⁻¹ ⊗ₜ[ℤ] z' by
    obtain ⟨N, z', h⟩ := this
    refine ⟨N, z', e.injective ?_⟩
    simp only [map_mul, h]
    trans e (j₁ ((N⁻¹ : ℚ) ⊗ₜ 1)) * e (j₂ z')
    · congr
    simp only [j₁, j₂, e, AlgEquiv.trans_apply, Algebra.TensorProduct.includeLeft_apply,
      Algebra.TensorProduct.assoc_tmul, Algebra.TensorProduct.assoc_symm_apply,
      Algebra.TensorProduct.includeRight_apply, Algebra.TensorProduct.tmul_mul_tmul, mul_one, one_mul]
    rfl
  induction e z using TensorProduct.induction_on with
  | zero => use 1, 0; simp
  | tmul q y =>
    use ⟨q.den, q.den_pos⟩, q.num • y
    simp only [TensorProduct.tmul_smul_right, PNat.mk_coe, ← TensorProduct.smul_tmul]
    congr
    rw [eq_comm, inv_mul_eq_iff_eq_mul₀ (Nat.cast_ne_zero.mpr q.den_pos.ne'), Rat.num_div_den]
  | add x y hx hy =>
    obtain ⟨nx, zx, rfl⟩ := hx
    obtain ⟨ny, zy, rfl⟩ := hy
    use nx * ny, (ny : ℤ) • zx + (nx : ℤ) • zy
    simp only [TensorProduct.tmul_add, TensorProduct.tmul_smul_right, ← TensorProduct.smul_tmul]
    rw [← TensorProduct.add_tmul]
    congr 1
    · rw [PNat.mul_coe, Nat.cast_mul, mul_inv, mul_comm (ny : ℚ)⁻¹, mul_assoc,
        inv_mul_cancel (Nat.cast_ne_zero.mpr ny.ne_zero), mul_one]
    · rw [PNat.mul_coe, Nat.cast_mul, mul_inv, mul_assoc,
        inv_mul_cancel (Nat.cast_ne_zero.mpr nx.ne_zero), mul_one]

let e := Algebra.TensorProduct.assoc ℤ ℤ ℚ 𝓞 ZHat
  obtain ⟨N, z', h⟩ : ∃ N : ℕ+, ∃ z', e z = (N : ℚ)⁻¹ ⊗ₜ z' := by
    induction e z using TensorProduct.induction_on with
    | zero => use 1, 0; simp
    | tmul q o =>
      use ⟨q.den, q.den_pos⟩, q.num • o
      rw [Rat.num_div_den q, div_eq_mul_inv, TensorProduct.tmul_smul, ← TensorProduct.smul_tmul']
      congr; rw [mul_comm]; norm_cast
    | add x y hx hy =>
      obtain ⟨N1, z1, rfl⟩ := hx; obtain ⟨N2, z2, rfl⟩ := hy
      use N1 * N2, N2 • z1 + N1 • z2
      simp only [TensorProduct.tmul_add, smul_add, Nat.cast_mul, mul_inv]
      congr 1
      · rw [← TensorProduct.smul_tmul', smul_inv_smul₀]; norm_cast; exact N2.2.ne'
      · rw [← TensorProduct.smul_tmul', mul_comm (N1:ℚ)⁻¹, smul_inv_smul₀]; norm_cast; exact N1.2.ne'
  use N, z'
  apply e.injective
  simp only [map_mul, AlgEquiv.apply_symm_apply, h]
  trans e (j₁ ((N : ℚ)⁻¹ ⊗ₜ 1)) * e (j₂ z')
  · congr
  · dsimp [j₂, j₁]
    rw [e.apply_symm_apply]
    have : e ((N : ℚ)⁻¹ ⊗ₜ 1 ⊗ₜ 1) = (N : ℚ)⁻¹ ⊗ₜ 1 := rfl
    rw [this, Algebra.TensorProduct.tmul_mul_tmul, mul_one, one_mul]

end HurwitzRatHat
